R
RFE Web Companion

No account? Switch to Register, or run rfe-agent adduser on the PC.

Uses the same one-time code as "Pair with code" — creates your account and pairs this browser together.

Token stored in this browser's localStorage — less secure than the phone app's Keystore. Only use trusted browsers.

Storage

Restart agent service

Interrupts active transfers; devices reconnect automatically.

Read-only mode

Block writes; browsing and downloads still work.

MB/s, 0 = unlimited
